topStories.description: The S&P 500 rose 0.44% or 30 points to 6,728.78 at open

topStories.title: Watch: Dancing Robot Suddenly Glitches, Shocking Diners In California
topStories.description: A Haidilao restaurant in California saw a robot malfunction and dance uncontrollably, forcing staff to step in, with the incident going viral online.

topStories.title: US west coast prepares for 'dangerous' heatwave in early spring
topStories.description: Severe weather is plaguing the US from coast to coast, bringing a mix of extreme heat and bitter cold.

topStories.title: Supreme Court strikes down law giving maternity leave only to mothers adopting children under 3 months
topStories.description: The bench also held that an adoptive mother should be entitled to maternity leave of 12 weeks, irrespective of the age of the adopted child.

topStories.title: US-Iran conflict: Israel says Basij chief Gholamreza Soleimani killed — all about the paramilitary force and its leader
topStories.description: Israel on Tuesday said that it has killed Gholamreza Soleimani, a senior officer in the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), who commands the Basij force. The IDF also claimed that Ali Larijani, secretary of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council, has been killed. Iran is yet to respond.

topStories.title: Congress expels Sofia Firdous, 2 other Odisha MLAs for voting for BJP in Rajya Sabha elections
topStories.description: Cong expels Sofia Firdous, 2 other MLAs in Odisha for voting for BJP in Rajya Sabha polls

dailyNews.title: BJP suspends dissident leader in Kottayam
dailyNews.description: Noble Mathew, national vice-president of Minority Morcha, has been suspended from the  primary membership of the party citing ‘anti-organisational activities’

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: 'This is not Europe's war'—EU nations rebuff Trump's call to send warships to Hormuz Strait
dailyNews.description: Europe has made it clear that it is not going to engage in the US and Israel's war in Iran, adding that Americans chose this path. Luxembourg's Deputy Minister went a step further with his rebuke of Donald Trump, stating that they will not be ‘blackmailed’ by Washington.

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Delta Air Lines lifts revenue outlook despite jet fuel hit, shares jump 4%
dailyNews.description: Delta Air Lines raised its first-quarter revenue forecast in light of robust travel demand, offsetting a hit from spiking jet fuel costs due to the Middle East war.

dailyNews.title: US Stocks: Qualcomm unveils $20 billion stock buyback program; shares jump 3%
dailyNews.description: Smartphone ​chip designer Qualcomm on Tuesday unveiled a $20 ​billion stock buyback program as it looks to take advantage of a steep drop in its share price, ‌which ⁠has been ⁠hit by a global memory supply crunch ​that is expected to slow handset manufacturing.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he believes he has 'honor' of 'taking Cuba,' calls Caribbean island a 'very weakened nation'

dailyNews.title: Multiple allies decline US calls for Strait of Hormuz support amid rising Middle East tensions
dailyNews.description: Several U.S. allies are refusing military involvement in securing the Strait of Hormuz, citing diplomacy, legal limits or strategic caution.

dailyNews.title: Michigan basketball star says he received stunning offer to play at Kentucky
dailyNews.description: Michigan Wolverines star Yaxel Lendeborg said in a recent interview he was offered between $7 million and $9 million to play for the Kentucky Wildcats.

dailyNews.title: Why I refuse to stay silent as Jews are scapegoated by left and right
dailyNews.description: Pastor Corey Brooks writes from Shreveport during his Walk Across America, defending Jewish people and Israel against attacks from both side of the political aisle.

dailyNews.title: 'Below Deck' Captain Sandy says she and wife lost 'all of our money' in alleged $1.6M contractor scam
dailyNews.description: "Below Deck" star Captain Sandy Yawn reveals she lost "all of our money" in alleged contractor scam. Spencer Calvert accused of defrauding 13 families.

dailyNews.description: DOJ emails show special counsel team identified House and Senate members who interacted with Mark Meadows and Rudy Giuliani during Trump's legal challenges

dailyNews.title: Video shows panicked Spring Break crowds fleeing beach hotspot after reports of five weekend shootings
dailyNews.description: Chaos erupted at Daytona Beach as five separate shootings reportedly sent spring break visitors running for cover over the weekend, authorities said.

dailyNews.title: Top counterterrorism official resigns in protest of US war against Iran
dailyNews.description: Joe Kent resigned Tuesday as head of the National Counterterrorism Center, citing opposition to the U.S. war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Map shows glaring scope of auto theft increase in Walz's Minneapolis: 'Deterrence problem'
dailyNews.description: Minneapolis saw a sharp rise in auto thefts in January and February of 2026, which a former state trooper says is part of a broader problem of a lack of deterrence.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Allies Reject Trump’s Demands for Warships, and Bovino to Retire From Border Patrol
dailyNews.description: Plus, the champion of “Swedish death cleaning” dies at 91.

dailyNews.title: War Isn’t the Only Thing on Trump’s Mind
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to journalists for about 40 minutes before holding a news conference on Monday, offering a glimpse into his priorities.

dailyNews.title: M.T.A. Sues Trump Administration to Release 2nd Avenue Subway Funding
dailyNews.description: New York transit officials are seeking nearly $60 million in overdue federal funding to extend the subway line to East Harlem. The administration’s rationale for the freeze has been inconsistent.

dailyNews.title: Richard Grenell: From Trump Cabinet Hopeful to Ex-Kennedy Center Manager
dailyNews.description: Richard Grenell once hoped to be President Trump’s secretary of state. Instead, Mr. Trump just replaced him as Kennedy Center president.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Weigh New Plan to Stop Offshore Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: Proposed settlements would block wind farms off New York State and North Carolina, according to documents reviewed by The New York Times.

dailyNews.title: Cuba Ready to Accept Outside Investment, Top Official Says
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s words came amid a nationwide blackout and as a top Cuban official said his country would move to open the economy to foreign investors.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Seeks to Remove Cuba’s President From Power During Negotiations
dailyNews.description: The United States has told Cuba that for meaningful progress to be made in negotiations, President Miguel Díaz-Canel must step down, said people familiar with the talks.

dailyNews.title: Top Trump counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's director of the National Counterterrorism Center, Joe Kent, announced his immediate resignation Tuesday, citing the administration's decision to intervene in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Senate GOP aims to begin marathon debate on SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The Senate is expected to begin a marathon debate on the SAVE America Act, an elections bill that President Trump has been pressing Republicans to pass.

dailyNews.title: Details on ruling blocking the Trump administration's vaccine policy changes for kids
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked the Trump administration from limiting the number of vaccines recommended for children. Medical societies challenged HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s order to drop six vaccines from the list of shots that children should have. CBS News medical contributor Dr. Celine Gounder explains what it means and what could happen next.

dailyNews.title: National Counterterrorism Center director resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: The director of the National Counterterrorism Center, a retired Green Beret and longtime supporter of President Donald Trump, says he has resigned over the war in Iran.
